layout.container: DialogContent with responsive width boundaries (e.g. sm:max-w-lg or sm:max-w-md)
layout.spacing: mt-6 space-y-6 (or space-y-4) for section groups
layout.grids: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-6 (or gap-4) for parallel input elements

formField.requiredIndicator: Red asterisk adjacent to label text when required
formField.supportingBadges: rightElement (e.g. points min/max bounds) styled as a small, bold uppercase badge with primary/5 bg

errorHandling.style: bg-destructive/10 text-destructive text-[10px] font-medium px-3 py-1 rounded-full w-fit mt-1.5 flex items-center gap-1.5

controls.textInputs: standard inputs (h-12 height, rounded-2xl border, px-4 padding)
controls.dropdownSelectors: standard select triggers (w-full relative, h-12 height, rounded-2xl border, px-4 padding, Title-Case formatting)

submitButtons.element: DialogFooter with Cancel (outline) and Action (contained) buttons
submitButtons.loadingState: Renders spinning Loader2 icon, disables buttons, and shows loading feedback during async submission
